title: Align wiki step definitions across Python and Rust
description: Update step definitions so check_spec_parity passes for wiki-related steps (use shared steps or matching patterns in both languages).
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Plan: run tools/check_spec_parity.py to identify mismatched steps; align wiki steps by adding generic steps or matching patterns on both Python and Rust; re-run check_spec_parity and full spec suite.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Aligned wiki step definitions to a shared generic form in Python and Rust; updated tarpaulin command in tools/run_specs.py to use --tests --test cucumber; added tarpaulin-only coverage helper in rust/wiki.rs; adjusted wiki feature templates back to issue_type. Ran: python3 tools/check_spec_parity.py; python3 tools/run_specs.py --format text (Python 100.0%, Rust 100.0%).
